---
title: "DataOps"
# subtitle: "My Visuan"
author: "Karen Hovhannisyan"
date: last-modified
image_path: "img/"
format:
  revealjs: 
    touch: true
    slide-number: false
    chalkboard: true

    preview-links: auto
    width: 1500
    transition: slide
    logo: img/favicon.png
    
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
          <style>
            .icon-xxl { font-size: 84px; }
            .icon-xl  { font-size: 64px; }
            .icon-lg  { font-size: 48px; }
            .muted { opacity: .8 }
            .pill { border-radius: 10px; }
            .circle { border-radius: 50%; }
          </style>
---

## Objective {.smaller}

- Transform data into a **strategic banking asset**  
- Eliminate **data silos** and enable **integrated decision-making**  
- Build a **scalable, governed, and AI-ready organization**



## The Core Problem: Data Silos {.smaller}

- **Fragmented systems across:**
  - Core banking  
  - CRM  
  - Risk  
  - Marketing  
  - Other Sources

- **Consequences:**
  - Inconsistent KPIs  
  - Slow decision-making  
  - Poor customer experience  
  - Limited AI capability 
  - Missing Single Source of Truth 

## Data Silos in Banking {.smaller}


![]({{< meta image_path >}}/data_silo.png)


## Data Silo management

![]({{< meta image_path >}}/data_silo_m)

## Why Silos Persist {.smaller}

- Organizational structure (departmental ownership)  
- Lack of governance and ownership  
- Technology fragmentation  
- **Cultural resistance to sharing data** 


## Cultural {.smaller}

<div style="justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center;">

**Data exists**, but is not **trusted or shared**

</div>

$$\downarrow$$


. . .

<div style="justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center;">

::: {.columns}
::: {.column}
Experience-driven  
:::
::: {.column}
Not data-driven 
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->
    
</div> 

$$\downarrow$$

. . .

<div style="justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center;">

**Teams optimize locally, not globally**

</div>

## The Role of the CDO {.smaller}

**Bridge:**

  - Business  
  - Technology  
  - Governance  

. . . 

**Shift organization from:** *Siloed thinking* $\rightarrow$  *Integrated, data-driven culture*
  


## Change Agent Model {.smaller}


![]({{< meta image_path >}}/change_agent_mode.png)


## From Silos to Integrated Bank {.smaller}
<!-- todo -->
```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Siloed Systems] --> B[Integrated Data Platform]
    B --> C[Trusted Data]
    C --> D[Analytics & AI]
    D --> E[Business Value]
```

<!-- 
IMAGE SUGGESTION:
Before/After transformation diagram:
Left: fragmented systems
Right: unified data platform
-->

---

## Data Strategy Model {.smaller}

- **Combine:**
  - **Execution Steps (6-step framework)**  
  - **Foundational Pillars (4 pillars)**  
- **Goal:**
  > Move from **strategy → execution → culture adoption**


## Integrated Framework {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart TB

    subgraph Steps
        A[Listen]
        B[Assess]
        C[Apply]
        D[Test]
        E[Execute]
        F[Scale]
    end

    subgraph Pillars
        P1[Data]
        P2[Technology]
        P3[Workflow]
        P4[Culture]
    end

    A --> B --> C --> D --> E --> F

    P1 --- A
    P2 --- C
    P3 --- E
    P4 --- F
```

<!-- 
IMAGE SUGGESTION:
Use matrix or layered diagram:
Horizontal = Steps (execution)
Vertical = Pillars (capabilities)
-->

---

## Listen Data {.smaller}

- **Align with business objectives:**
  - Revenue  
  - Risk  
  - Efficiency  

- Identify **critical data domains**:
  - Customer  
  - Transactions  
  - Risk  

---

## Assess + Technology {.smaller}

- Evaluate:
  - Current architecture  
  - Data pipelines  
  - Integration gaps  

- Identify:
  - Legacy constraints  
  - Scalability limitations  

---

## Apply + Workflow {.smaller}

- Embed data into:
  - Credit decisioning  
  - Customer journeys  
  - Marketing campaigns  

**Move from:** Reporting $\rightarrow$ Operational intelligence  

---

## Test + Governance {.smaller}

- **Ensure:**
  - Data quality  
  - Security  
  - Compliance  

- **Define:**
  - Ownership  
  - Policies  
  - Controls  

---

## Execute and Value Delivery {.smaller}

- **Build MVPs (small gains):**
  - Churn prediction  
  - Campaign targeting  
  - Risk scoring
  - Automations  
- **Deliver:**
  - Fast, measurable impact  

---

## Scale + Culture {.smaller}

- Expand successful use cases  
- Enable:
  - Data literacy  
  - Self-service analytics  
- Create:
  - Organization-wide adoption  


## The Four Pillars (Foundation) {.smaller}

- **Data:** $\rightarrow$ Trusted and high-quality  
- **Technology:** $\rightarrow$ Scalable and integrated  
- **Workflow:** $\rightarrow$ Embedded into operations  
- **Culture:** $\rightarrow$ Data-driven mindset  

---

## Cultural Transformation Journey {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Data Awareness] --> B[Trust in Data]
    B --> C[Adoption]
    C --> D[Data-Driven Decisions]
```

<!-- 
IMAGE SUGGESTION:
Maturity curve:
Awareness → Adoption → Optimization
-->



## Success Requires Alignment {.smaller}

- Data, Technology, Workflow, Culture must move **in lockstep**  
- Failure occurs when:
  - Tech advances faster than culture  
  - Data exists without governance  

---

## Target Architecture (Simplified) {.smaller}


<!-- 
IMAGE SUGGESTION:
Enterprise architecture diagram:
Include CRM, Core Banking, External Data → DW/Lakehouse → AI layer
-->

---

## Key Success Factors {.smaller}

- Executive alignment  
- Strong governance  
- Use-case driven execution  
- Continuous iteration  



##  {.smaller}

> The biggest barrier is not data or technology, it is **organizational culture**

- Break silos  
- Build trust  
- Deliver value  
- Scale adoption  

---

## The CDO's role in my undersdanting {.smaller}

**Data strategy must:**

::: {.incremental}

  - Start with business  
  - Deliver value quickly  
  - Scale through culture  

:::

. . .

$$\downarrow$$

**Lead transformation, not just data**
